chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 835 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of cases 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 29.11.2022 Ms. Aisha Saeed, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Advocate for private respondents Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> The petitioners have already availed their remedy against their grievances of removal of encroachments from the subject graveyard before the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal, Sukkur by moving Miscellaneous Application No.49 of 2021 which has been decided by the Tribunal directing the Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur being the Director Anti-Encroachment Force, Sukkur and Authorized Officer, Sindh Government to verify the relevant revenue record and remove the illegal encroachments from the graveyard in order to save it. The petitioners through instant petition, inter-alia, seek execution of the said order. The appropriate remedy is available to the petitioners under Section 16 of the Sindh Public Property (Removal of Encroachments) Act, 2010 before the Tribunal, hence, this petition is not pressed by learned counsel for the petitioners stating that the petitioners shall avail their remedy before the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal, Sukkur. Accordingly, the instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed. The petitioners are, however, at liberty to approach the Tribunal in terms of Section 16 of the said Act, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI
